title: Recipe For A Multi-Millionaire:
content:
Take a boy with bare feet as a starter
        Add thrift and sobriety, mixed -
     Flavor with quarts of religion,
        And see that the tariff is fixed.

        - Life.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Recipe For A Multi-Millionaire:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
